series_metadata.series_description: Includes letters to and from attorneys discussing official agency business, opinion letters, and other letters signed by OBR attorneys. Letters related to contracts and agreements will be kept as long as the retention schedule for the contract or agreement. Further, this record series only includes letters that are not related to records with other retention schedules.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from creation or receipt of letter ; Electronic: from creation or receipt of letter
